title: Strong Grass Sounds
description: Brings back the strong sounds of grass and other blocks
body:
In Minecraft 1.21.5 the sounds of some blocks were lowered. The goal of this pack is to restore those sounds.

I have seen other packs with the same finality but they only restored the grass sounds, i think this is because Mojang didn't mentioned any other sound being lowered in their changelogs (or at least i haven't seen it).

Below there is a list with the sounds that i noticed were lowered and restored by this pack:
* Digging:
  * Grass / Leaves
  * Dirt / Gravel
* Stepping:
  * Dirt / Gravel

There could be more sounds that were lowered that i didnt notice, but the moment i notice them i will update the pack.
